overview.title: Overview
overview.featured_text: Discover the authentic charm of a retreat at 1,500 meters. The elegance of simplicity and the warmth of a family-run hotel since 1980.

rooms.title: Accommodations
rooms.featured_text: Spaces designed for your rest. Natural wood, alpine light, and essential comfort to regenerate after a day in the heights.

restaurant.title: Alpine Taste
restaurant.featured_text: Authentic flavors of Aosta Valley. Zero-mile raw materials, family recipes passed down with care, and a convivial atmosphere.

wellness.title: Wellness
wellness.featured_text: The luxury of silence. Find your balance with our wellness paths and let yourself be pampered by the expert hands of our therapists.

sport.title: Activities
sport.featured_text: Adrenaline starts 20 meters from our door. Direct access to the lifts in winter and infinite panoramic trails in summer.

experiences.title: The Territory
experiences.featured_text: Not a simple vacation, but a collection of memories. Explore the territory through authentic activities, in total harmony with the rhythms of the mountain.

home.philosophy_title: We believe in the luxury of the essential, in human warmth, and in the value of slowed-down time.
home.philosophy_text: Hotel du Soleil is your Base Camp at 1,500 meters altitude. We have eliminated the superfluous to leave room for what truly matters: natural wood, the authentic flavor of alpine cuisine, and the majesty of nature just outside the door.
home.experience_text: Our promise is a practical and warm hospitality. Forget logical stress and let yourself be spoiled by the true flavors of our valley.
home.feature_access_text: Just 20 meters from the ski lifts and main trails. The mountain literally starts from our door.
home.feature_food_text: Half board offers menus that respect Aosta Valley tradition. Excellent raw materials, recipes handed down with care.
home.feature_comfort_text: Dedicated covered garage, Wi-Fi in common areas, and a warm lounge with a fireplace to relax at the end of the day.
home.restaurant_section_text: Authentic flavors of Aosta Valley. Zero-mile raw materials, family recipes passed down with care, and a convivial atmosphere that smells like home.
home.wellness_section_text: The luxury of silence at 1,500 meters. Find your balance between sauna, Turkish bath, and our relaxation area overlooking the peaks.
home.sport_section_text: Adrenaline starts 20 meters from the door. Direct access to the lifts in winter and breathtaking panoramic trails in summer.

struttura.subtitle: Alpine Elegance
struttura.title: The Structure
struttura.philosophy_title: The warmth of wood, the strength of stone.
struttura.philosophy_text: Hotel du Soleil was conceived to integrate harmoniously into the Torgnon landscape. Every detail reflects Aosta Valley tradition, reinterpreted with a modern and functional taste.
struttura.common_spaces_text: From our cozy hall to the fireplace room, every space is designed to encourage relaxation and conviviality. Large windows open onto the surrounding panorama, bringing the majesty of the Alps inside the hotel.

posizione.subtitle: In the Heart of Torgnon
posizione.title: Location & Surroundings
posizione.philosophy_title: Where the road ends, the mountain begins.
posizione.philosophy_text: Situated at 1,500 meters altitude, Hotel du Soleil overlooks the Matterhorn valley. An easily accessible yet wonderfully secluded refuge from daily chaos.
posizione.arrival_text: Piazza Frutaz 30, Torgnon (AO). Located in the town center, we offer a dedicated covered garage for our guests and the incredible convenience of having the ski lifts just steps from the hall.
posizione.by_car_text: A5 Turin-Aosta motorway, Châtillon-Saint-Vincent exit. Continue on SR 9 towards Valtournenche, then turn for Torgnon (about 20 min from the exit).
posizione.by_train_text: Châtillon-Saint-Vincent railway station. From here, direct SAVDA bus service to Torgnon or hotel-contracted taxi service.
posizione.by_plane_text: The nearest airports are Turin Caselle (110 km), Milan Malpensa (170 km), and Geneva (180 km). We organize private transfers upon request.

sostenibilita.subtitle: In Harmony with the Environment
sostenibilita.title: Sustainability
sostenibilita.philosophy_title: We respect the mountain, we care for the future.
sostenibilita.philosophy_text: We are custodians of a precious and fragile territory. For this reason, we daily adopt sustainable practices that reduce our environmental impact and promote the local economy.

energy.title: Clean Energy
energy.text: Solar panels for hot water production and low-consumption LED lighting.

plastic.title: Zero Plastic
plastic.text: We have eliminated plastic single-portions in favor of dispensers and glass bottles.

water.title: Spring Water
water.text: We value the pure water from the Torgnon springs, filtered and served at the table.

km0.title: Km 0 & Organic
km0.text: We prioritize valley producers to reduce emissions related to transport.

sport.philosophy_title: Adrenaline starts 20 meters from the hall.
sport.philosophy_text: Forget the car. In Torgnon, at 1,500 meters, nature is not a destination, it's your starting point. Whether it's ski-in/ski-out or heroic trekking, we offer you the perfect comfort before and after the adventure.

sci.title: Ski & Snowboard
sci.subtitle: Direct access to the Torgnon ski area. Perfectly groomed slopes, breathtaking views of the Matterhorn, and the convenience of returning to the hotel with your skis on.

bike.title: MTB & E-Bike
bike.subtitle: Explore the trails of the Aosta Valley on two wheels. From adrenaline-pumping routes for experts to gentle panoramic walks for families, Torgnon is a paradise for bikers.

termini.title: Terms & Conditions
termini.section1_text: Bookings made through the website or direct channels are confirmed upon receipt of a 30% deposit of the total stay. The balance will be paid at the property upon check-out.
termini.section2_text: Free cancellation up to 14 days before arrival. In case of late cancellation or no-show, the deposit will not be refunded.
termini.section3_text: Rooms are available from 2:00 PM on the day of arrival. Check-out must be completed by 10:30 AM on the day of departure.

matrimoniale.name: Double Room
matrimoniale.description: Our double room in Torgnon offer a simple, warm, and functional refuge, perfect for couples or skiers who want a practical stay in the Aosta Valley. Characterized by traditional solid wood furnishings, these rooms blend the warmth of classic design with an extraordinary view of the surrounding peaks.

tripla.name: Triple Room
tripla.description: Our triple room in Torgnon is the ideal solution for those looking for a mountain holiday in the Aosta Valley without sacrificing space. With a surface area of up to 20sqm, these rooms offer an atmosphere of quiet.

quadrupla_standard.name: Standard Quadruple
quadrupla_standard.description: Quadruple Room in Torgnon: The Ideal Space for your Family. If you are planning a family holiday in the Aosta Valley, our quadruple rooms in Torgnon offer the perfect refuge.

familiare.name: Family Quadruple
familiare.description: The most exclusive accommodation, designed for the maximum comfort of the family in the mountains. Ample spaces and premium finishes.

footer.description: A silent refuge in the heart of Torgnon. Substance, elegance, and the warmth of Aosta Valley since 1980.
footer.rights: © 2026 Futuro srl - Hotel du Soleil. All rights reserved.

kids_club.title: Kids Club
kids_club.subtitle: Fun in the Heights
kids_club.description: A space dedicated to our youngest guests, where imagination knows no bounds. Games, creative activities, and qualified assistance to allow parents to relax knowing their children are in good hands.

eventi.title: Meetings & Events
eventi.subtitle: Versatile Spaces
eventi.description: The ideal environment for your business meetings or private events. Equipped rooms, panoramic views, and an excellent catering service curated by our restaurant.

policy.title: Stay Policy & Conditions
policy.rooms_intro: Prices are expressed in Euros and the municipal tourist tax applies. Please note that rates and tourist tax may vary without notice based on local regulations. Tourist tax does not apply to children under 14.
policy.included_title: Daily prices are per room and include
included_items: High-speed Fiber Wi-Fi throughout the property.
Dedicated ski-box for equipment storage (located 20m from the lifts).
policy.tariffe_note: Rates also include: access to the lounge area with fireplace and immediate proximity to ski lifts and hiking trails of Torgnon.
policy.colazione: Breakfast: If purchased on-site, the breakfast cost for room-only rates is € 15.00 p.p.
policy.mezza_pensione: Half Board: Includes typical Aosta Valley dinner (beverages excluded, unless otherwise specified in group packages).
policy.checkin_checkout: Check-in time: from 3:30 PM; check-out time: by 10:30 AM.
policy.cancel_intro: To definitively confirm the booking, a deposit of 30% of the total stay (or the first night for short stays) is required.

cancel_rules.label: Free cancellation
cancel_rules.text: Up to 14 days before the expected arrival date, the deposit will be fully refunded (net of any bank processing fees).

cancel_rules.label: Late cancellation (14 to 7 days before)
cancel_rules.text: The deposit will not be refunded, but can be converted into a voucher of equal value, usable for a future stay within 6 months (subject to availability).

cancel_rules.label: Cancellation under 7 days or No-Show
cancel_rules.text: The deposit will be retained in full as compensation.

cancel_rules.label: Early departure
cancel_rules.text: In case of early departure during the stay, the total amount for the remaining nights will be charged (room only).

family_items: Daily housekeeping service between 8:30 AM and 12:30 PM.
Priority access to the indoor Covered Garage (by reservation, a supplement may apply).
Reserved ski-box just steps from the gondola lift departure.
policy.groups_text: For bookings of 4 or more rooms (organized groups, clubs, or multiple bookings traveling together), the hotel will apply customized deposit and cancellation conditions that will be sent by email during the quotation phase. Generally, for groups, free cancellation is available up to 30 days before arrival.
policy.parking_text: Hotel du Soleil has a heated covered garage. For safety and space optimization reasons, guests using the garage are asked to leave their vehicle keys at Reception for the entire duration of their stay. Alternatively, a free public parking lot is available approximately 100 meters from the property.
policy.images_text: Room images on the website are for illustrative purposes. Some design elements, wood finishes, and furniture arrangements may vary within the same room category, while maintaining the promised standard and services.

cookie_policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie_policy.intro_text: This Cookie Policy explains how Hotel du Soleil uses cookies and similar technologies on our website. By using our website, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with this policy.
cookie_policy.what_text: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better browsing experience by remembering your preferences and understanding how you use our site.
cookie_policy.essential_text: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as page navigation, access to secure areas, and basic site features.
cookie_policy.analytics_text: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our website's performance and user experience.
cookie_policy.functional_text: These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our pages.
cookie_policy.manage_text: You can control and manage cookies in various ways. Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings preferences.
cookie_policy.browser_text: You can set your browser to refuse all or some browser cookies, or to alert you when websites set or access cookies. If you disable or refuse cookies, please note that some parts of this website may become inaccessible or not function properly.
cookie_policy.contact_text: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or this Cookie Policy, please contact us:
